overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a cyberpunk city at night, descending from an elevated walkway past neon-lit buildings into a lower plaza. The scene features wet pavement reflections, prominent pink TENGU signage, and dense urban architecture with holographic advertisements characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon city views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway toward the TENGU building with neon-lit skyline ahead

entered.detail: Multi-story building with large pink neon TENGU sign on roof and illuminated windows
Metal safety railing with integrated warm lighting running along walkway edge
Tall skyscraper covered in multiple digital billboards and cyan neon displays
Outdoor dining area with purple neon lighting under trees

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway at night, approaching the distinctive TENGU building with its bright pink neon signage. The path is lined with metal railings and overlooks a dense cyberpunk cityscape of glass towers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell descending to lower plaza

events.description: turns right from open walkway into enclosed concrete stairwell with wall-mounted lighting
begins descending metal stairs toward the lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: turning right and descending the concrete stairs into the lower plaza, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket and dark pants walking down stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: Rough textured concrete walls with horizontal LED lighting strips
Large red illuminated billboard displaying DYNALAR advertisement with hand imagery
Diamond plate metal stairs with illuminated edge lighting

segments.scene_description: Turning into a narrow concrete stairwell, descending metal grate stairs past the large red DYNALAR billboard. The enclosed space features rough concrete walls with linear lighting, transitioning from the open elevated walkway to the lower plaza level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with storefronts and digital advertisements

events.description: exits stairwell into open plaza with wet reflective pavement and ground-level storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet plaza past various storefronts and digital displays toward the circular building

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the AVANTE storefront entrance

entered.detail: Modern circular building with curved glass facade and colorful neon accents
Commercial storefront with illuminated AVANTE signage and large glass display windows
Tall palm trees in raised planters dividing the plaza walkway
Reflective wet tile pavement showing mirror-like reflections of neon lights

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into a spacious open plaza with wet reflective pavement. The camera walks past the AVANTE storefront and palm tree planters, heading toward a distinctive circular glass building visible ahead, with neon advertisements illuminating the surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated urban walkway down into a neon-lit lower plaza. It begins by moving along a concrete path lined with metal railings, approaching the bright pink neon signage of the TENGU building amidst a backdrop of glass towers and digital billboards. As the camera turns away from the skyline, the scene shifts into a narrow concrete stairwell, descending metal grate stairs past a large red DYNALAR billboard. The enclosed space then opens up as the camera emerges from the stairwell into a spacious plaza characterized by wet, reflective pavement. Finally, the movement continues past the AVANTE storefront and palm tree planters, heading toward a distinctive circular glass building illuminated by surrounding neon advertisements.
